description: International one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in the Netherlands in 2013 by Klaas Otto, a former Satudarah member. The club has over 1,600 members worldwide, with leadership primarily of Dutch Traveller, Turkish, and Kurdish origin. It has been permanently banned in the Netherlands since 2022 and has chapters in multiple countries.
